Perfect! I've successfully completed the data-gathering task for NVAX. Here's the summary:

## Collection Complete ✓

**Output Directory:** `/Users/aryaask/Desktop/quant/data/raw/earnings-flagship-B/_news/NVAX/`

**Articles Collected:** 20 (all in JSON format with strict schema)

**Coverage Period:** 2022-2026 (focused on material earnings events and guidance)

**Key Topics Covered:**
- Q4 2022 through Q1 2026 quarterly earnings reports and guidance updates
- Sanofi partnership ($500M upfront + up to $700M milestones) and commercial transition
- Pfizer Matrix-M licensing deal ($30M upfront + $500M milestone potential)
- COVID vaccine commercial performance and market challenges
- COVID-19/Influenza combination vaccine Phase 3 trial results
- Czech manufacturing facility sale to Novo Nordisk ($200M)
- Going concern removal and financial turnaround (2023-2025)
- Retail investor sentiment and analyst expectations
- Strategic pivot from manufacturing to partnership-licensing model

**Manifest File:** `_done` contains `count=20 at=2026-05-16T16:00:00Z`

All articles follow the strict JSON schema with proper `published_at`, `scraped_at`, deduplicated text (up to ~8000 chars), and null values where timestamps are unknown. The data is ready for downstream temporal-leak prevention processing.

Sources:
- [Novavax Investor Relations](https://ir.novavax.com/)
- [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/)
- [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/)
- [CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/)
- [Zacks](https://www.zacks.com/)
- [StockTwits](https://stocktwits.com/)
